candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue row; preferred over duplicate total.
Duplicate top-line total with identical values; useful as fallback if label changes across years.
Not operating revenue; finance income.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attributable to minority interest, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as a priority list; both rows are top-line and numerically identical.

candidates.row_label: Raw materials and change in inventories
candidates.why: Direct production/input cost line and the only income-statement COGS-type row.
Balance-sheet asset, not period expense.

final_choice.row_label: Raw materials and change in inventories

variables.notes: Selected the income-statement direct cost row; balance-sheet inventory is not COGS.

candidates.why: Personnel overhead component above operating profit.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A component, but likely embedded within broader overhead buckets; including it risks double counting.
Residual operating overhead bucket above operating profit; appropriate when no single SG&A subtotal exists.
Administrative overhead component, but appears to be a subcomponent of other operating expenses in some years, so including both would risk double counting.
Balance-sheet asset, not SG&A expense.
Balance-sheet gross asset, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal is present. Chose the two broad operating overhead buckets above operating profit. Excluded Administrative Expenses and Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses to avoid likely double counting within Other operating expenses / personnel costs.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: R&D-related wording exists, but this is amortization of capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense.
Balance-sheet asset, not R&D expense.
Balance-sheet gross asset, not R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance-sheet contra-asset, not R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No dedicated R&D expense line is present on the income statement. The only R&D-related row is supplemental amortization of capitalized R&D, which should not be used as XRD.

candidates.why: Broader finance-cost total that may include non-interest items; less preferred than granular interest rows.
Direct recurring interest expense line.
Recurring interest component on lease liabilities; should be added to interest expense if reported separately.
Not a finance cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure that appears duplicative of Interest expenses on lease.
Balance-sheet liability, not interest expense.
Equity item, not interest expense.
Equity item, not interest expense.

variables.notes: Used granular recurring interest-cost components and excluded broader Financial expenses to avoid double counting and excluded supplemental lease-interest row as duplicative.

candidates.row_label: Changes in the fair value of equity investments at fair value through other comprehensive income
candidates.why: OCI component, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Income-flow item, not balance-sheet equity.
Asset/investment line, not equity.
Best available balance-sheet equity line; no separate parent/owners equity line is shown.
Shareholder count, not equity amount.

variables.notes: No separate parent/owners-only equity row is available, so using Total equity for BE. To avoid double counting, MIB is left empty.

candidates.why: Income-statement allocation, not balance-sheet minority interest.
Direct balance-sheet NCI line, but should be excluded when BE uses Total equity.
Direct balance-sheet minority-interest line, but should be excluded when BE uses Total equity.
Income-statement attribution, not balance-sheet minority interest.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income-flow item, not balance-sheet minority interest.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income subtotal, not minority interest balance.

variables.notes: Because BE is mapped to Total equity, MIB is intentionally left empty to avoid double counting non-controlling interests already included in total equity.
